Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total candles: {len\(d\)}''''\); print\(f''''First open_time: {d[0][""open_time""]}''''\); print\(f''''Last close: {d[-1][""close""]}''''\); print\(f''''Sample: open={d[-1][""open""]}, high={d[-1][""high""]}, low={d[-1][""low""]}, close={d[-1][""close""]}''''\)")
